product_perspective: Independent web-based application (frontend and backend) for Pathfinder 2e Game Masters.

product_scope.description: A metadata-driven Campaign Simulation Engine to create, manage, and share dynamic campaigns and world events.
in_scope: Deterministic encounter generation based on scene metadata
out_of_scope: AI generation of game mechanics, monster stats, or check DCs
Player-facing active gameplay mechanics or VTT integration (unless specified as export)

operating_environment: Web browser, communicating with a FastAPI backend and PostgreSQL/MongoDB data layer.
